notes: The agent failed to handle interruptions and errors gracefully, leading to an abrupt call termination and poor overall conversation quality.

bugs.title: Abrupt call termination
bugs.expected_behavior: The agent should have continued to assist the patient or transferred the call to a live support agent as previously mentioned.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_barge_in scenario, interrupt the agent mid-explanation and observe the call termination

bugs.title: Poor error recovery and context loss
bugs.evidence_quote: It looks like there's already an appointment booked in the system, but you mentioned you don't have one.
bugs.expected_behavior: The agent should have properly addressed the patient's concern about the existing appointment and provided a clear solution or alternative.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_barge_in scenario, correct the agent about an existing appointment and observe the error recovery

bugs.title: Missing morning preference inquiry
bugs.evidence_quote: You already have an appointment booked for this type of visit.
bugs.expected_behavior: The agent should have asked about the patient's preference for a morning appointment as part of the scheduling process.
bugs.reproducibility: edge_barge_in scenario, reach the scheduling discussion and observe if the agent inquires about morning preference
